docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-26-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT BASED ON 10-8-97 ENTRY OF DEFAULT.
